# AI Context for @json-express/seeder-faker

Populates the database with realistic fake data during local development.

## Setup
```typescript
import { SeederFaker } from '@json-express/seeder-faker';
kernel.registerSeeder(new SeederFaker());
```

## AI Instruction
- Do not manually write loops to insert data. This seeder automatically reads the `defineModel` schemas and generates data that matches the field types using Faker.js.
